title: An Act to Exempt Certain Income from State Income Tax
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 4/11/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on April 11, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
